articles.title: 3 Pivotal Factors That Could Drive Ripple’s XRP Price to $12, According to This Analyst
articles.description: Despite this uncertainty, well-known crypto analyst Zack Rector has outlined three pivotal factors that could drive XRP to new heights.

articles.title: XRP Forecast: Is A Retreat Below $0.5 Likely Before October?
articles.description: XRP has maintained its position within the confines of a symmetrical triangle pattern, with today’s modest surge doing little to alter its trajectory. This symmetrical triangle pattern has exerted significant influence over XRP’s price movements for the past month, indicating that it may continue to dictate the coin’s fate in the near future. The symmetrical triangle pattern is a technical...

articles.title: Why Cardano could drop to 400 sats in Q4
articles.description: An analyst’s projection of 400 sats could also be backed by the individual performances of both cryptocurrencies. With Bitcoin unwilling to let down its dominance, ADA may be on the brink.
